parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "workspace_id": $json.workspace_id,
  "mission_id": $json.mission_id,
  "run_id": $json.run_id,
  "contract_name": "CrmStrategyRecommendationsGenerated.v1",
  "contract_version": "v1",
  "event_name": "ks.crm.strategy.recommendations_generated",
  "event_id": $json.run_id,
  "idempotency_key": "crm-strategy-reco-" + $json.run_id,
  "risk_level": "low",
  "psi_state": "map",
  "producer_domain": "n8n.crm.strategy",
  "consumer_domain": "kernel.crm.strategy",
  "occurred_at": $now.toISO(),
  "trace_refs": ["n8n:crm_strategy_intel_v1"],
  "payload": {
    "strategy_window_days": Number($json.strategy_window_days || 28),
    "high_value_spend_min": Number($json.high_value_spend_min || 300),
    "segments_in_scope": ["high_value_spend", "new_buyers", "lapsed_paid", "course_started_no_progress"],
    "focus_areas": ["products", "pricing", "promotions", "messaging", "conversion_pipeline"],
    "recommendations": ($json.recommendations || []).map((r, idx) => ({
      "id": r.id || ('rec-' + (idx + 1)),
      "theme": r.theme || 'unspecified',
      "confidence": Number(r.confidence || 0),
      "expected_lift": {
        "metric": (r.expected_lift && r.expected_lift.metric) || 'conversion_rate',
        "relative_lift": Number((r.expected_lift && r.expected_lift.relative_lift) || 0),
        "expected_delta": Number((r.expected_lift && r.expected_lift.expected_delta) || 0)
      },
      "risk": {
        "level": (r.risk && r.risk.level) || 'medium',
        "rationale": (r.risk && r.risk.rationale) || 'review_required'
      }
    })),
    "recommendation_count": (($json.recommendations || []).length)
  }
}

={
  "workspace_id": $json.workspace_id,
  "mission_id": $json.mission_id,
  "run_id": $json.run_id,
  "contract_name": "CrmStrategyIntentProposed.v1",
  "contract_version": "v1",
  "event_name": "ks.intent.created",
  "event_id": $json.run_id,
  "idempotency_key": "crm-strategy-intent-" + $json.run_id,
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "psi_state": "commit",
  "producer_domain": "n8n.crm.strategy",
  "consumer_domain": "kernel.crm.intent",
  "occurred_at": $now.toISO(),
  "trace_refs": ["n8n:crm_strategy_intel_v1"],
  "payload": {
    "intent_type": $json.intent_type || "draft_strategy_message_offer",
    "strategy_theme": $json.strategy_theme || "segment_message_offer_pricing",
    "target_segments": $json.target_segments || ["high_value_spend", "lapsed_paid"],
    "recommendation_ids": $json.recommendation_ids || [],
    "approval": {
      "required": true,
      "scope": $json.approval_scope || "offer_promo",
      "reason": $json.approval_reason || "Offer, pricing, and promotion strategy intents require human approval before execution.",
      "default_status": "pending_approval",
      "required_approver_roles": $json.required_approver_roles || ["crm_owner", "growth_lead"]
    }
  }
}

={
  "workspace_id": $json.workspace_id,
  "mission_id": $json.mission_id,
  "run_id": $json.run_id,
  "contract_name": "CrmStrategyIntentProposed.v1",
  "contract_version": "v1",
  "event_name": "ks.intent.created",
  "event_id": $json.run_id,
  "idempotency_key": "crm-strategy-gate-" + $json.run_id,
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "psi_state": "commit",
  "producer_domain": "n8n.crm.strategy",
  "consumer_domain": "kernel.crm.intent_gate",
  "occurred_at": $now.toISO(),
  "trace_refs": ["n8n:crm_strategy_intel_v1"],
  "payload": {
    "intent_type": $json.intent_type || "draft_strategy_message_offer",
    "allow_auto": [],
    "force_draft": ["draft_strategy_message_offer", "draft_strategy_pricing_experiment", "draft_strategy_promotion_plan", "draft_strategy_conversion_pipeline"],
    "force_escalate": ["apply_live_price_change", "launch_unreviewed_promotion", "consent_override", "suppression_override"],
    "approval": {
      "required": true,
      "scope": $json.approval_scope || "offer_promo",
      "reason": $json.approval_reason || "Offer, pricing, and promotion strategy intents require human approval before execution.",
      "default_status": "pending_approval",
      "required_approver_roles": $json.required_approver_roles || ["crm_owner", "growth_lead"]
    }
  }
}

={
  "workspace_id": $json.workspace_id,
  "mission_id": $json.mission_id,
  "run_id": $json.run_id,
  "contract_name": "CrmStrategyApprovalRequested.v1",
  "contract_version": "v1",
  "event_name": "ks.intent.approval_requested",
  "event_id": $json.run_id,
  "idempotency_key": "crm-strategy-approval-" + $json.run_id + "-" + ($json.intent_type || "intent"),
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "psi_state": "commit",
  "producer_domain": "n8n.crm.strategy",
  "consumer_domain": "kernel.crm.approval",
  "occurred_at": $now.toISO(),
  "trace_refs": ["n8n:crm_strategy_intel_v1"],
  "payload": {
    "intent_type": $json.intent_type || "draft_strategy_message_offer",
    "strategy_theme": $json.strategy_theme || "segment_message_offer_pricing",
    "target_segments": $json.target_segments || ["high_value_spend", "lapsed_paid"],
    "recommendation_ids": $json.recommendation_ids || [],
    "approval_scope": $json.approval_scope || "offer_promo",
    "approval_reason": $json.approval_reason || "Offer, pricing, and promotion strategy intents require human approval before execution.",
    "approval_status": $json.approval_status || "pending_approval",
    "required_approver_roles": $json.required_approver_roles || ["crm_owner", "growth_lead"],
    "recommendation_snapshot": {
      "confidence": Number($json.confidence || 0),
      "expected_lift": {
        "metric": ($json.expected_lift && $json.expected_lift.metric) || "conversion_rate",
        "relative_lift": Number(($json.expected_lift && $json.expected_lift.relative_lift) || 0),
        "expected_delta": Number(($json.expected_lift && $json.expected_lift.expected_delta) || 0)
      },
      "risk": {
        "level": ($json.risk && $json.risk.level) || "medium",
        "rationale": ($json.risk && $json.risk.rationale) || "human_review_required"
      }
    }
  }
}

parameters.jsonOutput: ={"status":"ok","note":"Strategy intents generated and gated. Execution remains approval-driven."}
